rationale: TASK-056 acceptance is met: config schema v4 is present in project config/templates/types; roadmap supports canonical sprint cohorts and generated sprint/scope views; workflow cursor is available from graph/state/session; build DAG edges from TASK-055 feed graph; hot/warm/cold/purgeable GC views and sprint-close hooks are generated; agency planning accepts roadmap/sprint/task scope with token/time/cost/write/session/risk budgets and emits a plan-only session_spawn_plan gated by config, claims, and scope.
